---
#title: "Outbreak! Investigation and Response"
subtitle: "Interactive Simulation Module"
author: "Department of Biology, Wake Forest University"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: reveal-theme.scss
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    title-slide-attributes: 
      background-color: black
      color: white
    logo: ../assets/logo-wide.png
    footer: "Department of Biology · Wake Forest University"
    progress: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
---

# Malaria Control: Strategy, Economics, and Modeling{.title-slide}

## The Global Burden
* **The Toll:** ~249 million cases and 608,000 deaths annually (2022/23 data).
* **The Target:** Reducing incidence by 90% by 2030.
* **The Metric:** $PfPR_{2-10}$ (Plasmodium falciparum Parasite Rate in children aged 2–10).
    * This is our "gold standard" for measuring community transmission.
